problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: Bacteriophage surface display for targeting may resolve What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
